Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: start uvicorn before model load — keep LB connection alive

Root cause: load_model() blocked for 2+ min before uvicorn started.
Port 8000 was dark during model load → RunPod LB health checks failed
→ worker terminated → fetch failed after 4 min (LB proxy timeout).

Fix:
- @app.on_event("startup") loads model in background thread
- uvicorn starts immediately → port 8000 live from second 1
- /stream sends SSE comment heartbeats every 20s while model loads
  (keeps LB connection alive; SSE comments ignored by client)
- model_ready threading.Event signals when model is fully loaded
- asyncio.get_running_loop() + call_soon_threadsafe for thread→async bridge
- json.dumps() for SSE payloads (not f-string with single quotes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: reschedule_booking date parsing + closed-day validation

Two bugs fixed in elevenlabs-reschedule-booking:

1. DATE PARSING: parseDate() couldn't handle "Wednesday March 11" format
   (weekday prefix + month + day). It fell through all patterns and defaulted
   to today (2026-03-08 = Sunday). Added weekdayMonthDay pattern to extract
   month + day correctly, ignoring the weekday prefix.

2. CLOSED-DAY VALIDATION: Function had no business hours check. When AI
   sent a valid date that fell on a closed day (e.g. Sunday for a Mon-Sat
   business), the booking was silently created on a closed day. Now fetches
   hours_json from tenant, validates the resolved date is an open day, and
   returns a helpful error with the next available day if closed.

Same parseDate fix applied to elevenlabs-check-availability (same gap).

Fixes handoff 709 (pool_service reschedule_booking date mismatch bug)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Review: Zstd.lean quality pass — unfold_except macro, grind audit, termination cleanup (#915)

* refactor: extract unfold_except tactic macro in Zip/Spec/Zstd.lean

Replace 20 identical `simp only [bind, Except.bind, pure, Except.pure] at h`
calls with a local `unfold_except` tactic macro. The macro is unhygienic
(captures `h` by name) and local (not exported to downstream files).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: audit grind calls and remove unused termination hints

Audit all 6 grind calls in decompressFrame_* theorems: verified each is
appropriate for deeply nested monadic case-splitting where manual split
would require 4-6 nested blocks. Updated misleading comments (split does
work on structure field matches; the real issue is nested bind chains).

Remove 4 unused termination_by/decreasing_by clauses that Lean can infer
automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: progress entry for Zstd.lean quality review

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* doc: skill update — tactic macro hygiene pattern for simp at h

Document the working pattern for defining local tactic macros that
reference hypothesis names, and the many non-working alternatives
discovered during the Zstd.lean review session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

feat: validate input schema on retrigger + deployment guide (#104)

* feat: validate input schema on retrigger

retrigger() now validates the original run's input against the current
job's input schema. If the schema has evolved and the old input is
incompatible, a clear error is thrown instead of creating a run that
will fail at execution time.

Closes #94

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add job versioning and deployment guide

Document how step name-based matching affects deploys: safe changes,
risky changes (step rename, output type change, schema evolution),
and breaking changes (job rename, logic rewrite). Covers retrigger
input validation added in the previous commit.

Closes #95

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: simplify retrigger schema validation test

Remove unnecessary worker startup and polling — directly set the
run to failed status with incompatible input via DB update.

commit.message:
Refactor hooks, add critical tests, E2E flow specs

Hook architecture:
- Split monolithic use-messages.ts (479 lines) into four focused hooks:
  use-conversations, use-chat-messages, use-message-actions, use-message-media
- use-messages.ts becomes a thin facade with identical public API
- Fix: useChatMessages now resolves loading=false when no conversationId,
  preventing the facade's loading flag from staying permanently true

Bug fixes:
- Chat.tsx: handleResumeConversation now calls refreshConversations() so the
  paused banner clears immediately without waiting for Realtime propagation
- validation.ts: remove duplicate sanitizeString; import canonical sanitizeHtml
  from sanitization.ts (stricter: also strips vbscript, data URIs, null bytes)
- ChatConversationList: show "N closed conversations not shown" indicator so
  users know why some connections are missing

Tests — safety-critical:
- EmergencySOS: 16 tests covering countdown, cancel, trusted contacts fetch,
  SOS insert, toast on success/failure, geolocation fallback
- use-top-pick: 9 tests covering localStorage, week-key rotation, fallback logic

Tests — coverage uplift (1416 tests, 106 files):
- Components: ChatMessagesPanel, IcebreakerQuestions, MessageActions,
  MessageReactions, ProfileForm, BlogList, BlogPost, BlogPreview, BlogNudge,
  CohortChart, FunnelChart
- Hooks: use-haptics, use-security, use-top-pick, use-conversation-limit,
  use-unread-count
- Features: use-blog, use-translation, use-referral, intent-prompts

E2E flow specs (3 new files):
- sos-flow: floating button, dialog, contacts, countdown, fire, cancel,
  geolocation fallback (10 tests)
- payment-flow: Read Receipts CTA, checkout edge function, URL opened,
  subscription state toggle (5 tests)
- match-expiry-flow: empty state, match card render, near-expiry indicator,
  confirm button RPC (5 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

improve brand cards copy and personalize fallback search button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 주식 데이터 다운로드 오류 2건 수정 + RSI 저점 전략 프리셋 추가

## 버그 수정
- pykrx int32 오버플로우: 레버리지 ETF(KODEX 200선물인버스2X 등)는
  거래량이 int32 한계(21억)를 초과해 OverflowError 발생.
  venv 내 pykrx/naver/wrap.py의 astype(np.int32) → astype(np.int64) 패치.
- setuptools 버전 충돌: Python 3.14 + setuptools>=72 에서 pkg_resources
  모듈이 분리되어 pykrx import 자체가 실패.
  requirements.txt에 setuptools<72 고정 추가.
- data_fetcher: OHLCV 컬럼 전체를 astype(float) 선처리해 numpy 타입
  오버플로우 이중 방어.

## 기능 추가
- 전략 빌더에 RSI 저점 전략 프리셋 패널 추가.
  단기/중기 RSI 기간·저점 임계값을 입력하면 AND 조건 전략을 즉시 생성.
  입력값 변경 시 조건 미리보기 실시간 반영.

commit.message:
RigSafe: 3-zone load engine + dual rack support + tent/fridge audit fixes

Compute engine refactor:
- Split vehicle mods into Frame Mods, Bed Cargo, and Rack load zones
- Add secondary rack support (bed rack + cab roof rack simultaneously)
- Individual occupant tracking with sleeper/non-sleeper distinction
- Rack cargo presets tagged by location (rack vs bed)
- Updated weight breakdown, payload, and warning systems

Tent audit (7 corrections):
- OVS HD Bushveld: 175→208 lbs (CRITICAL — was 33 lbs under)
- Thule Tepui Autana: 152→130 lbs (tent-only, annex tracked separately)
- Roofnest Falcon 2: 160→140, TOPOAK Galaxy Pro: 165→176
- GFC V2 Pro: 140→135, Eeziawn Blade: 175→181, Front Runner: 95→93

Fridge audit (3 corrections):
- ARB Zero 47Qt: 48→52.6 lbs
- ICECO VL35 ProS: 46→48.7 lbs
- ICECO VL60 Pro: 61→65 lbs

fix: add prod DB migration checker and fix P2022 on Vercel

Root cause: dueDate column was added to local SQLite but never applied
to Supabase (production PostgreSQL), causing P2022 on Vercel dashboard.

Changes:
- Added scripts/check-prod-migration.ts: uses prisma migrate diff to
  detect schema drift between models and prod DB, can auto-apply fixes
- npm run db:check-prod: check for drift
- npm run db:migrate:prod: apply missing changes to production
- DashboardView: show actual error message instead of generic text
- CLAUDE.md: added mandatory step 5 for prod migration check after
  any schema change

- Reorder session param before Query defaults in all 3 route handlers
- Fix double-wrapped `Session = Depends(SessionDep)` → `SessionDep`

  version with get_db override is used

- platform: check DB for existing email before calling Supabase auth;
  if email exists as orphan auth user (no DB record), reuse that Supabase

- adjacency POST: validate tableAId/tableBId present, check for existing

- adjacency DELETE: guard against missing body fields, return 400 not 500

commit.message:
test: add 458 chaos tests + harden Zod schemas against malicious input

Add fuzz-style boundary tests that simulate chaotic user input (type
confusion, injection payloads, unicode abuse, number extremes, array
bombing, unbounded strings) against all Zod input validation schemas.

Harden 20+ schema fields that previously accepted unbounded input:
- Add .max() to 10 unbounded arrays (tags, followUpQuestions, targetLanguages, etc.)
- Add .max() to 14 unbounded string fields (type, moodContext, genre, refreshToken, etc.)
- Add .max() per-item to 3 arrays that accepted 1MB items
- Add YYYY-MM-DD regex to birthdate (was accepting any 10-char string)
- Add .uuid() to chapterId/sourceEntryId in MusicGenerateSchema
- Add .url() to artworkUrl in MusicGenerateSchema
- Fix real bug: ConfirmOrchestrationFlowUseCase published events before
  validating plan data, leaving system inconsistent on missing plans

Also includes 2,400+ tests from prior coverage expansion across all
packages (platform-core, shared-contracts, system-service, and service
test quality improvements).

The permission callback in web_server.py calls pause_session() directly

and coordinator wrapper remain removed.

fix: KST 타임존 날짜 표시 버그 수정 + 중복 헬퍼 통합

버그: formatDateShort/addDays에서 new Date(str+'T00:00:00+09:00') 후
로컬 메서드(.getDate()/.getDay()) 사용 → UTC 서버에서 날짜 하루 밀림.
예: 3/28(토) → 3/27(금)으로 표시됨.

수정:
- src/shared/kst.ts 신규: 정오 KST 파싱 + UTC 메서드로 날짜 경계 문제 해결
- 3곳 중복 KST 헬퍼(prompt.ts, home.ts, life-cron.ts) → kst.ts로 통합
- formatDateShort, addDays, getTodayISO 등 7개 함수 일원화
- 프롬프트에 일정 변경 후 목록 표시 규칙 + 백로그 관리 추가
- kst.test.ts 신규 (13개 테스트, 요일/날짜 경계 검증)

fix(cms): type fetchApi as generic to fix data.data type inference

Make fetchApi generic: fetchApi<T>() so each call site specifies
its return type (e.g. { data: Section[] }) instead of Record<string, unknown>
which caused setSections(data.data) to fail type checking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ingest): auto-refresh QR code every 90s during scan-wait loop

Signal Desktop QR codes expire after ~2 minutes. Previously the user
had a single QR that went stale while the system waited 9.5 minutes.
Now the scan-wait loop clicks "Refresh code" in Signal Desktop every
90s and sends the fresh QR to the user, extending the effective scan
window to the full wait period.

- Detail cards: remove shadow/top stripe, add 1px --green border; flat card borderless
- Paper cards: dashed SVG border (5px dash/gap), rounded 16px corners, transparent bg
- Photos section: enredadera.png decorative vines left/right, hidden on mobile
- Details section: decorative M/R Imperial Script initials (--ink, 4% opacity)
- Green band: flexbox centering (vertical + horizontal)
- Favicon set to mono.svg; OG image set to foto-anillo.jpg
- RSVP no-attend: emoji changes to ❤️‍🩹, header "Te tendremos en el pensamiento"
- Hero gradient uses color-mix with --green variable
- .overlay background fixed to color-mix 80% --green

fix: allow multiple spend sources to coexist, fix LinkedIn test mode label

- Removed deactivateSpendSourcesForCampaign calls from all spend
  process endpoints (manual, CSV, Google Sheets, LinkedIn, connectors)
  so multiple spend sources can coexist and aggregate in Total Spend
- LinkedIn test mode now saves sourceType as "linkedin_api" instead of
  "manual", showing "LinkedIn Ads" in micro copy
- Cleaned up displayName defaults: "Google Sheets", "CSV", "LinkedIn Ads",
  "Manual entry" (removed verbose "(to date)" suffixes)
